div1.entryFree:
Currish, 1) becoming a dog: she says your dog was a cur, and tells you c. thanks is good enough for such a present, Gentl. IV, 4, 53. Lucentio slipped me like his greyhound . . . A good swift simile, but something c. Shr. V, 2, 54.
2) malicious: thy c. spirit governed a wolf, Merch. IV, 1, 133. to change this c. Jew, Merch. IV, 1, 133 his c. riddles sort not with this place, H6C V, 5, 26.*
